title: Overall protocol for top-down CZE-MS/MS of human small intestine tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8trjo","text":"Overview description of the process for acquiring top-down capillary zone electrophoresis MS/MS data on human small intestine tissue","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Small intestine tissue was provided by Stanford University TMC. Tissue was collected according to the following: https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bin8kdhw
